svg.text: > PaaS MARKETPLACE PLATFORM — DEDICATED SUBSCRIPTIONS PER CLIENT_

g.text: Artifact Repository — Docker, Helm, Maven, npm
> Status: ONLINE | Artifacts: 12,450 | Storage: 2.8 TB | Pulls: 45K/day

svg.text: ARTIFACT PULL — PaaS Subscriptions consume artifacts from commercerndci via Internet
DEDICATED SUBSCRIPTION PER CLIENT — Each client gets an isolated Azure subscription with its own Marketplace instance,
AKS cluster, databases, and networking. All PaaS subs pull artifacts from the central commercerndci subscription.
> GLOBAL: ALL OPERATIONAL | SUBS: 10 (9 PaaS + 1 commercerndci) | AKS: 28 nodes | ARTIFACTORY: 12,450 artifacts | ORDERS: 21,350/day | UPTIME: 99.99%
